message:
fix(codegen): Fix finally block generation inside try-with-finally

- When raise stores to __pending_exception_N, also push exception onto
  stack so that finally's bare raise can find it via getCurrentException()
- Remove control_flow_terminated = true when storing to pending exception
  so that inline finally block is generated
- Add popException and propagate after inline finally block completes
- Add class method generator fixes for completeness

This enables test_finally_reraise to correctly re-raise the pending
exception (KeyError) instead of the outer exception (TypeError).
